# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                sh 'mvn clean package'
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                sh 'mvn test'
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                sh 'mvn deploy -Dmaven.deploy.skip=true'
                sh 'kubectl apply -f kubernetes/deployment.yaml'
            }
        }
    }
}

post {
    success {
        // do nothing
    }
    failure {
        // send notification
        mail to: 'jenkins@localhost',
             subject: "Jenkins build failed",
             body: """The Jenkins build has failed!

                 The job was ${env.JOB_NAME}
                 The reason for the failure was: ${currentBuild.failureMessage}"""
    }
}

node('master') {
    stage('Clean up nodes') {
        steps {
            // clean up nodes
        }
    }
}
